en.value:
1. Environment Conservation

	A. Establishment/renovation of tree nurseries- 4 nurseries

	 

	B. Production/collection of tree seedlings - 60,000 seedlings

	 

	C. Pre-plantation training- 8 training, 400 farmers

	 

	D. Tree plantation program-  60,000 seedlings

	 

	 

	2. Alternative Energy:                                                

	A. Bio-gas plant construction 500 plants

	 

	B. Toilet construction- 500 toilets

	 

	C. Biogas operation & slurry mgnt. training- 10 training, 500 HHs

	 

	3. Sustainable Agriculture

	 

	A.  IPM training on vegetable cultivation- 18 trainings, 540 farmers

	 

	B.  Basic organic vegetable cultivation training- 8 training, 300 farmers

	 

	C.  Organic compost & pesticide making training- 12 training, 600 farmers

	 

	D.  Organic farming study tour- 10 tours, 500 farmers           

	 

	E.  Improvement of irrigation facilities - 4 facilities

	 

	F. Introducing improved vegetable seeds- 400 farmers

	 

	G. IPM Demonstration Plot establishment-  4 plots

	 

	H.   Pheromene trap distribution- 1000 traps, 500 farmers

	I.  Provision of extension service- 4 staffs

	 

	4. Sustainable Livestock:

	 

	A. Breed improvement through AI-  2000 cattle

	 

	B. Cattle shed improvement- 300 sheds

	 

	C. Urine collection bucket distribution- 3000 buckets

	 

	D. Fodder grass slip distribution- 200000 slips

	 

	E. Livestock management training- 12 trainings, 600 farmers

	 

	F. Livestock vaccination campaign- 20 campaigns

	 

	G. Cattle manure improvement- 300 farmers

	 

	H. Support to enhance goat raising- 100 farmers

	 

	I. Provision of extension service- 1 staff          

	 

	5. Appropriate Technology:

	 

	A. Chaff cutter distribution- 300 pieces

	 

	B. Plastic tunnel erection- 300 tunnels

	 

	C. Plastic pond construction- 300 ponds

	 

	D. Introducing drip irrigation system- 300 sets

	 

	6. Market Promotion:

	 

	A. Post-harvest training-  6 training, 300 farmers

	 

	B. IPM/Organic products' marketing study Throughout 5 years

	 

	7. Health & Sanitation:

	 

	A. Basic Health & Sanitation Training- 8 training 400 farmers

	 

	B. Low-cost toilet construction-  300 toilets

	 

	8. Capacity Development:

	 

	A. Regular Users' Group meeting-  576 meetings

	 

	B. Capa. Dev. training for local users' group- 15 training

	C. Printing booklet on sus. agriculture- 1000 copies           

	D. Printing booklet on sustainable livestock-1000 copies

	 

	E. Booklet on tree plantation- 1000 copies

	 

	F. Capacity development training for staffs- 5 training, 10 staff

	 

	9. Follow up, monitoring and reporting:

	A. Participatory monitoring & evaluation by SWC      2 times

	 

	B. Reporting and documentation- 10 times
